## [00:00 - 03:04]

In this video I'm going to take you on a walkthrough of the FATC Student Portal. So to access the Student Portal you'll go to student.digitaldistillery.com You might already be watching this video in the Student Portal or you might be watching it in the Facebook group. Student.digitaldistillery.com and then you're going to sign in to your account. If you haven't yet received your login details just get in touch with support. And then click sign in. When you sign in if you have access to FATC only this is what you'll see. You'll see library and then the course that you have access to which is FATC. You can access the course either by clicking here or clicking here. Once you're in you'll see a couple of things. So there's a button here to start FATC. You've got all of the categories for FATC here and you can see there are seven. Right now once we add the bot content in you'll see eight. Over here is the thumbnail for the course and then over here you can see how many lessons there are and how many you've completed. A little bit about CAT over here and very importantly the support email as well. So if you need to email anyone specifically about your membership, about cancellation or if you have any specific questions about the membership want to change your credit card details anything like that. That's when you email support anything else in terms of getting support from the coaches on your campaigns about Facebook ads. Put all of that inside the Facebook group. So that is covered here as well in the FATC support section which is the first category that you have access to. In here you'll find support FAQs. So how to change the credit card, what to do there, who to email and so on. And then a little section on graduating to the academy as well. So for those who don't know the academy is the next step up from FATC. So if that's the path you're leaning towards then I strongly recommend checking out this section as well. Coming back out here the next section you're going to see is the course introduction. So this is where the course really kicks off. So in the introduction section which if you're watching this video in the student portal this is where you are right now. You'll start off with a message from Kat, meet the coaches and then where we are here which is the student portal and the student portal experience. Definitely make sure that you watch through all of the content here in the course introduction section. Because this is going to tell you everything you need to know about your membership. When the calls are how to get on the calls, where to find the replays for the calls. And how to request support on the calls. If you want to book a one-on-one with the coaches that's in here as well. If you want to know who the coaches are and a little bit about them you'll find that in the meet the coaches section. So this is a really important area of the membership. Make sure you check this out before progressing any further. Just have a read through, it won't take you too long and then you'll be up to scratch on everything FATC.

## [03:04 - 05:19]

So the next thing you're going to do is access level one. So level one is Facebook, basic Facebook ads. So you'll notice if I click in this right now it's telling me that the category is locked. So you can't access level one without acknowledging that you're ready to unlock it. So to answer this question, are you ready to unlock it? Yep, ready to go and you're just going to come down here and click mark as complete. Once you click that button you can see it's completed and now the next section has been unlocked for me. So this is the first video inside Facebook ads basic which will take me straight through here and now I can keep going in that section of the course. And now if I jump back out here and I try to go into Facebook ads basic you can see this is unlocked all of the content here for me. And then same thing for advanced Facebook ads towards the end. And then once you get to beyond advanced Facebook ads you'll notice there's three sections here that are kind of similar. So you've got FATC lead gen framework, FATC e-com framework and FATC coaches and online courses framework with an SOP for each of those as well. If you are only working in the e-com space or say you have an e-commerce business you don't necessarily have to go through the lead gen framework and the coaches and online courses framework. These three aren't sequential so don't feel like you have to do all of them. Just pick the path that best suits you and your needs and if you do want to watch all three of them then go for it. But you definitely don't have to if it's not the type of content that you need and the type of training that's going to benefit you. So that's the ins and outs of the student portal. If you're still stuck you can't find anything keep in mind that there is a search function up here. So if you're looking for content on the pixel these are all of the sections that mention the Facebook pixel for example. So this is a really handy aspect of the student portal as well. Make sure to get good use out of that and at that point if you're still stuck and you really have no idea what's going on please pop a post in the Facebook group and the coaches can help you out and point you in the right direction.
